description_long: This is a modern single-story house set on a spacious green lot with multiple outbuildings and landscaped features. The main house has a flat roof, large windows, and an open floor plan visible from above, with distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas. The property includes a detached garage, a circular gazebo, a rectangular swimming pool, and several paved walkways connecting the structures. Mature trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the lot, providing shade and visual interest. The driveway leads directly to the garage and main entrance, which is accentuated by a small set of steps and a covered porch. The overall layout is open and functional, with a focus on outdoor living and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open layout, surrounded by landscaped grounds, a garage, gazebo, and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, entry steps, covered porch, and the driveway leading to the garage, with landscaped trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open floor plan, the circular gazebo, and the rectangular pool, with the garage and additional outbuildings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gazebo, pool, and the arrangement of trees and walkways, with the garage and house in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, open green space, and the back of the house, with fewer visible entry features and more focus on the lot's expanse.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small set of steps, a covered porch, and a simple modern door with minimal decorative elements.
